highlights.summary: Rajkiya Engineering College, Basti, is located in Uttar Pradesh. Rajkiya Engineering College, Basti provides 4 UG courses in 4 specialisations, namely Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering and Electronics Engineering. Theses programmes are offered in Full Time mode. B.E. / B.Tech is some of the courses offered at Rajkiya Engineering College, Basti. Some of the stream in which these courses are offered include Engineering. Rajkiya Engineering College, Basti offers all the infrastructural facilities to students.

review_content.Placements: We are the foundation batch of the college so there is no idea about placement percentage. There is no highest and lowest package because our batch is the foundation batch of Basti.
review_content.Infrastructure: The labs are also not available for the experiments.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers of Rajkiya Engineering College, Basti are very kind and gentle. They always help students in all the fields in which students want help. They also motivate students to participate in all the activities which are organized by the college and also from outside. I’m sorry to say that there is a lack of faculty at Rajkiya Engineering College Basti. Because it is a new college, the faculty is not available for all the subjects. There are so many problems we are facing, but day by day the faculty of our college solving all the problems.

description: Rajkiya Engineering College, Basti cutoff 2025 has been announced for admission to BTech programme for all categories and rounds in the both the All India and Home State quota. Students can scroll to the exam-wise sections below for details about Rajkiya Engineering College, Basti UPTAC Cutoff 2025 and other exams. A few more exam-related updates are in the pointers below:

The Rajkiya Engineering College, Basti cutoff 2024 was concluded for JEE Main with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as the opening and closing ranks for admission to the BE/BTech, courses. During the Rajkiya Engineering College, Basti BE/BTech cutoff 2024, the last-round closing ranks ranged between 256074 and 1013243 for the General AI category students. Of all the BE/BTech specialisations, the one that faced fierce competition was B.Tech. in Computer Science and En

The JEE Main cutoff 2024 was released for the General, OBC, ST, SC, EWS, and PWD categories in the AI quota. Considering the last round 2024 cutoff, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering was the most sought-after BE/BTech specialization with a closing rank of 256074 for the general AI quota. The closing cutoff for the same stood at 244836 in 2023.

Rajkiya Engineering College, Basti accepts JEE Main scores, followed by JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds for admission to BTech and Integrated BTech courses. Candidates seeking admission to Rajkiya Engineering College, Basti can refer to the table below for tentative JEE Main schedule.

Rajkiya Engineering College, Basti JEE Main cutoff 2024 is now over for BTech, Integrated BTech, and BArch courses. For JEE Main, a total of five counselling rounds were conducted. Additionally, two CSAB counselling rounds were also conducted to fill the vacant seats. Candidates can refer to the table below to download the consolidated year-wise counselling rounds for Rajkiya Engineering College, Basti.

As the Rajkiya Engineering College, Basti UPTAC Cutoff 2025 has been concluded for all rounds and categories under the AI and HS quota. Students can refer to the table below to find the Round 1 and Last Round closing cutoff ranks for admission to various B.E. / B.Tech specialisations available at Rajkiya Engineering College, Basti.
In this section, students can see UPTAC Cutoff 2025 for admission to various B.E. / B.Tech specialisations.

For 2025, in the last round, the top three most competitive specialisations for admission in the General AI category students were B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering, followed by B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering, and B.Tech. in Civil Engineering, with the closing ranks of 291954, 1969737 and 2110572, respectively.

For admission to Rajkiya Engineering College, Basti for B.E. / B.Tech students have to clear the UPTAC exam and attain valid ranks to qualify for a seat at this institute. Students can see the table below to know the important dates for admission to Rajkiya Engineering College, Basti.

faqs.question: What is the fee for various courses at National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology Ropar?
faqs.answer:
Hello Nishar,
The National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology (NIELIT) Ropar offers a wide range and variety of courses in the fields of Computer Science, Electronics, and IT. The tuition fees for various courses at NIELIT Ropar also vary but to give a general bracket we can see the fee structure as follows:
Certificate courses: INR 2,300 - 15,000
 UG Diploma courses: INR 22,700 - 1.1 lakh
But here mentioning this is also important as this is just an estimate, for the most updated and accurate information you must go through the user friendly official website of the institution with your specific subject and course.

faqs.question: Does National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology Ropar have good placements?
faqs.answer:
The Indian Institute of Technology Ropar is one of the top public technical universities in the country. The IIT Ropar's outstanding placement record is one of its main selling points. Top businesses from a range of sectors come to the campus every year to hire bright minds.
NIRF 2023 ranks IIT Ropar 22nd in the engineering category. IIT Ropar guarantees an attractive investment return. The 2023 IIT Ropar placements are officially published. 82.21% of the B.Tech class and 56.44% of the M.Tech batch were placed at IIT Ropar. Among the hiring managers that IIT Ropar placements work with are Amazon, Zomato, Adobe, Microsoft, Google, Ericsson, etc. 
Placement Statistics of 2023
the highest Salary  INR 55 LPA
Average Salary  INR 22.49 LPA
Median Salary  INR 16.62 LPA

faqs.question: Does NIELIT Ropar offer better placements than NIELIT Shimla?
faqs.answer:
NIELIT Ropar: Based on the information at hand, NIELIT Ropar has a solid placement history. 95% of students are said to get placed through IIT placements. The institute maintains relations with IIT Ropar, which offers NIELIT students job chances.
NIELIT Shimla: This institute has a strong placement history as well. Among the top recruiters are several well-known businesses including TCS, Infosys, Wipro, HCL, and IBM. A specialised placement cell inside the institute offers a range of placement services.Even if both institutions have a strong placement history, the precise comparison may vary depending on the courses and areas of expertise. It would be preferable to get in touch with the placement departments of both institutes or check their official websites for the most accurate comparison.

faqs.question: Can I get into NIELIT Ropar with 65 percentile in class 12?
faqs.answer: Recently, Round 1 seat allotment results for admission to NIELIT Ropar has been released by the institute. Considering the NIELIT Ropar JEE Main cutoff 2025, the closing rank stood at 40473 for B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) under General AI quota. It is mandatory for the candidates to acquire an eligible rank, it doesn't matter how much you have acquired in your 12th grade. It is always your JEE Main rank which will let you to take admission to your dream course at IIT Guwahati. Somehow, getting a decent percentile in 12th also helps candidates to boost their confidence to get them ready to soar over the exam.

After taking several certificate courses, students will be able to make small presentations and will have all the necessary skills required for a successful career. Certificate courses are easy to pursue and provide great flexibility to students. Along with the short-term courses, NIELIT Ropar also provides long-term courses to students that are also popular. Some of them are 'o' Level, 'A' Level, and 'B' Level courses. Students opting for these courses are taught Information Technology Tools and Network Basics, the Internet of Things and its Applications, and others. Below mentioned are some of the courses and their respective eligibility and NIELIT Ropar fees:

The college has an online placement portal that permits the free registration and submission of various details by NIELIT qualifiers.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: NIELIT Ropar offers a number of courses in the domain of IT and Electronics that include formal degree programmes, certification courses, and specialised training. The college offers MCA, MSc, BCA, and BSc in affiliation with University of Kashmir. NIELIT certification courses include ‘O’ Level, ‘A’ Level, and ‘B’ Level courses, which are recognised by GoI and are equivalent to various UG and PG degrees in IT. Additionally, NIELIT Ropar offers short-term and corporate training programmes to upskill professionals and students in specific technical areas. description: NIELIT Ropar cutoff 2025 for BTech, MTech, and other courses are available on this page. Candidates preparing for the next academic session can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the NIELIT Ropar JEE Main cutoff 2025 along with other exams for different courses, rounds, and categories. Further exam-related updates are below:

NIELIT Ropar JEE Main cutoff 2025 for the first and last rounds are tabulated below for the General AI category students. In the last round, the NIELIT Ropar CSE cutoff 2025 was 102823 in the General category belonging to the AI quota. The cutoff ranks for core BTech branches are usually on the lower side, indicating competitive cutoff rank for admission.

For the General AI category students, the NIELIT Ropar B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 was 102823 in the last round. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 102823, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) was the most competitive branches for admission among the students belonging to the General category.

JEE Main is the accepting exam for admission to the BTech and other UG courses. Qualified candidates are then eligible for the JoSAA and CSAB counselling process for final seat allocation. In this section, aspirants can find out all the important JEE Main 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

JoSAA counselling 2025 is now over for admission to the Engineering courses offered at NIELIT Ropar. In 2025, the JoSAA counselling was conducted for up to six rounds. Further counselling rounds were conducted by CSAB to fill the vacant seats. Students who appeared for the JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds can refer to the table below to view or download the round- and year-wise JEE Main cutoff lists for BTech admission at NIELIT Ropar to understand the cutoff trends.

As per the GATE cutoff 2025, the top two most challenging M.E./M.Tech specialisations were M.Tech. in Automotive Electronics and M.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence with last round cutoff scores of 365 and 360, respectively, for the General AI quota. In the table below, candidates can view the branch-wise first and last round cutoff scores.

Tabulated below are the GATE CCMT last round cutoff scores for 2025, 2024 and 2023 across different rounds, categories and quotas. For the General AI quota, the last round cutoff scores varied between 350 and 365. While for the OBC category students, the final round cutoff scores were concluded between the range of 319 and 341 in the AI quota.

Tabulated below are the GATE cutoff lists across different rounds and years for ME/MTech admission at National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology. The consolidated cutoff list will help students understand the past years cutoff trends.

Considering the last round of NIELIT Ropar CCMT cutoff 2025, core M.E./M.Tech branches, including Automotive Electronics and Artificial Intelligence, witnessed higher cutoffs for admission, while branches such as Cyber Forensics and Information Security and Data Engineering had comparatively relaxed cutoff scores for admission in the General category under the AI quota.

college_info.intro:
National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology Ajmer (NIELIT Rajasthan) extends a range of long term certificate courses in IT and Electronics field for various levels such as DLC (CCC), DLC (CCC+), CHMT 'O' Level, etc. NIELIT Ajmer Rajasthan also offers short term/ industrial training/ diploma courses in IoT Application, Cyber Security, Solar PV System Installation, Web Development, Multi Media Animation and various other IT, Electronics, Multimedia and Digital Literacy courses.
The flagship course at National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology Rajasthan is its BE/BTech in Computer Science and Engineering (Internet of Things, Cyber Security including Block Chain Technology) course that spans 4 years. The fees for this course is usually INR 50,225 for the first semester and consists of Tuition Fee, Development Fee, Security Deposit (refundable), Institute Fee, BTU Development Fee and Exam fee.
The Institute gives admission through online and offline mode. NIELIT Ajmer Rajasthan centre fee structure offers these courses within INR 1.2 K to INR 1.34 K tuition fees. Candidates can take a look below at the National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology Ajmer popular programmes below:

placements.overview: Also the National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology Rajasthan prepares its students for employment with short term/ industrial training/ diploma courses in IoT Application, Cyber Security, Web Development, Multi Media Animation, etc. which are lucrative fields.

Efforts are being made to facilitate suitable job offers to the students after their course completion. The students can register for free on NIELIT placements portal and submit their CV. faqs.question: Does NIELIT Ajmer offer better placements than NIELIT Chennai?

fees_and_eligibility.overview:
National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology Ajmer (NIELIT Rajasthan) extends a range of courses that can be categorised as short-term, long-term, Course on Computer Concepts (CCC) or Modules on E-Content Portal.

overview_faqs.question: Is NIELIT Ajmer a good option?
overview_faqs.answer: The National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology, also known as NIELIT Ajmer is funded by the Ministry of Electronics & Information Technology (MeitY), Government of India (GOI). This institute offers courses across Electronics, Computer Science and Information Technology and related disciplines. The campus features state-of-the-art infrastructure and is well-equipped to provide long / short-term courses, e-learning modules and consultancy services to students. The institute offers multiple certificate and UG Diploma courses with a reasonable fee structure with monthly or hourly durations, depending on the course. Hence, NIELIT is a good option for students willing to pursue any of these certificate or UG Diploma courses.

overview_faqs.question: How is life at NIELIT Ajmer?
overview_faqs.answer: NIELIT Ajmer offers certificate and UG Diploma courses. Students have an on-campus facility of labs and library. Students can go to the library to issue a book of their choice. The library is well-equipped with books of all subjects. The institute also has a hostel facility with round the clock security services. The hostel rooms are spacious and comfortable and the food of the mess is also healthy and tasty. NIELIT Ajmer also has an e-learning platform that is based on collaborative working, creativity, multidisciplinarity, adaptiveness, intercultural communication and problem solving, has taken on an important role in everyday life.

paragraphs: Admissions to NIELIT Ajmer are merit-based. Candidates must apply for their desired course through the application form that is available on the official website of the institute. The courses are offered at Certification, UG & PG Diploma course levels for candidates. Check out the steps below to learn about the steps for admission:
NIELIT Ajmer Application Process 2026

The application process for NIELIT Ajmer is online and offline. Candidates are required to create an account by filling in their information. Once registered, candidates can proceed to fill out the application form and pay the application fees.
Selection Round

NIELIT Ajmer gives admission on a merit basis to candidates. The candidates are judged on various factors such as their academics and co-curriculums. Candidates are required to submit authentic data related to their academics in the application form.
Final Offer

Candidates who make it to the final shortlist of the admission process are offered a seat to their applied for course. Candidates are then required to pay the tuition fee to start attending the online classes.

Courses at NIELIT Ajmer are offered at varying course fees. Candidates who have cleared the admission process are eligible to pay the course fee at NIELIT Ajmer and secure their admission. The seat intake is decided by the institute to disclose the total number of candidates who will be admitted. Learn more aboutNIELIT Ajmer feeand seat intake through the table given below:

reviews.review_heading: I am disappointed with the college facilities but somehow it's good.
reviews.review_text: The college's infrastructure is excellent. The surroundings are pleasant. The campus is kept up well and is neat and clean. Classrooms are also kept in good condition. The library's infrastructure is excellent. I like it a lot because they change the style regularly. But the hostel facilities are deplorable. Numerous restrictions were unnecessary. The food was of poor quality, but it was manageable.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied with hostel facilities but college facilities are better.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facilities are very poor. There were many unnecessary restrictions. Food quality was bad.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because our college faculty members are good.
reviews.review_text: A hostel facility is available. Wi-Fi is in good condition, and the library is also in good condition. The quality of food served in the hostel is good and healthy. Medical facilities are available in our college. Sports and games are good in our college.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because faculty members are very good. Everything is good in this college.
reviews.review_text: Everything is available, like course materials, Wi-Fi, labs, fully advance classrooms and a library. Wi-Fi is fast, and classrooms are very good and well-designed. Medical facilities are not available in the college, but the canteen and food are very good.

reviews.review_heading: I'm dissatisfied as they are not providing any placement opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. Surroundings are good. The campus is well maintained and is neat and clean. Classrooms are well maintained as well. The infrastructure of the library is outstanding. I like it a lot as they are changing its style regularly. Quality of food in the canteen is not very good but manageable.

content.Placements: I'm in the final year of my course, and there are few companies that have visited my college and offered jobs to some students. review_summary.college_name: College of Engineering and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Come only if you want to do B.Tech for cheap.

content.Placements: In my course, around 8% of students got placed, with the average package being around 4 to 5 LPA. The highest package scored by a student was 48 LPA, which was off-campus. Recruiting companies are TCS, Wipro, Tata, etc. Roles offered on-campus are generally just for employees.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure-wise, the college is pretty small compared to others. It's just barely 10 acres, not that much, and the ground is left empty. There is no hostel in the college. The canteen is really small, with no scope for sports and games. The food in the canteen is really bad and unhealthy.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Review of College of Engineering and Technology, Mahatma Gandhi Mission's Trust.

content.Placements: There were no placements provided by this college. Only Amazon visit to hire students for custom support executive. No students got internships from this college. If students were looking for higher studies, then students can join this college. If students were trying to make a career, then I would not recommend this college.
content.Infrastructure: Multiple laboratories were available, but faculty members were not trained enough. Most of the systems were not working in the laboratories. So there was no benefit of having a laboratory, also students were not allowed into the laboratory more than once a week. There was no sports facility or canteen.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: Awesome life at mgm, nice faculty, awesome samosas.

content.Placements: Placement for my batch is not good at all. Only three to four students were placed in private companies. The average package from my college was 3.4 lac per annum. There were some companies like grape city, tech mahindra visited in my campus. Many of the students were offered as GET. No one got internship from my college but they have conducted paid internship on Staad. Pro, Oracle etc.
content.Infrastructure: The Wi-Fi facilities in my campus is very poor but the classrooms here are very neat and clean. There were no provision for medical facilities in my college. The library is very good here and all books are available here. The qualities of lab are very good and classrooms are very neat and clean.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: The fee structure is less and no good infrastructure.

content.Placements: The students face the biggest issue that, no one is going to help you out in getting the job you need to study and work hard. Companies would be coming, every year many companies arrive to hire the student, but they only want the toppers in the placement no participation of faculty members in this placement.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is not good. The fee structure is good. The crowd is not good as due to low fees many can take admission so you can understand what I mean to say. The college has somewhat village atmosphere. It is under-developed college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: A great platform to build a career in engineering.

content.Placements: The placement in the college was great in the year 2016. Almost 70% of the students were placed. In our final year, around 55% of the students got a job. The placement in the college is good and the number of companies visiting every year is increasing. In the year 2018, around 40 companies are there to visit, and till now, 60% students have been placed. Let's hope for the best in coming years.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is getting better year by year. The college has a good building with large classrooms with a projector in each classroom. A wide corridor is present outside the rooms, and the ventilation of air is perfect in the rooms. There is a very large ground for the students with proper grass and trees. The greenery of the college attracts everyone. The seminar hall is very large and great with full air-conditioning. It is a great environment totally.

highlights.summary: Here are some additional updates regarding the Konkan Krishi Vidyapeeth:

placements.overview: Founded in 1972, Konkan Krishi Vidyapeeth is a public university. It is located in Ratnagiri, Maharashtra. The institute is accredited with ICAR. Konkan Krishi Vidyapeeth provides UG, PG and Doctorate courses in Full Time mode. It provides 38 courses across specialisations such as Agriculture, Agriculture & Farm Engineering, Agriculture & Food Business, Biotechnology Engineering and Chemistry. Some of the courses offered at this institute include B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, B.Sc. and M.Sc. Konkan Krishi Vidyapeeth fees is INR 48,000. The student intake for these courses is 145. Konkan Krishi Vidyapeeth offers these course across fields such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and Science. Konkan Krishi Vidyapeeth offers all the campus facilities to students.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Fisheries Science - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Things you should know before taking admission in College of Fisheries, Ratnagiri.

review_content.Placements: The fisheries course is nice for those who own a pond or are planning to make a pond. Further, you can also work in the fisheries industry such as food processing or value addition industries. All jobs regarding the fisheries sector are available, and further, you can do Masters and Ph.D.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the boys' hostel is not good, but that of the girls' hostel is nice, and the fee is also less. The mess is present in both hostels, and the hostels are present near the college only. The library is present and provides students with all the required books and other books required for competitive exams.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Agriculture - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied with the teachers and faculty members, as well as the infrastructure .

review_content.Placements: Students were placed based on their knowledge instead of percentage and the highest package was a 3.5 LPA from Sygenta with the job role of Sales Executive. Also for the internships, the company was Swal Corporation from Kopargaon and Sangamner, with a period of 3 months and a stipend of Rs 10k per month for marketing executives.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college includes Wi-Fi, a gym, high-tech labs, large classrooms, a library, a nursery, farms, poultry and a hostel. It is neat and clean, with moderate room sizes and beds, including food. There is also ground for Kabaddi, football, volleyball and kho-kho. The tournaments are held in college and all the fests are celebrated in college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. Hons. in Horticulture - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: All the facilities were given to the students.

review_content.Placements: 36 percent of students were placed in our course. 7 LPA was the highest, 2.3 LPA was the lowest, and 3 LPA was the average package offered in our course. The top recruiting companies for our course were Reliance, Remini, etc. 45% of students get internships through our course.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our institute was good. The institute was offering all the facilities to students, which were good, including Wi-Fi, labs, libraries, big classrooms, etc. The quality of the facilities in the hostel was good. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen was good to eat.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.F.Sc. in Aquaculture - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: It is an excellent college for doing a master's degree.

review_content.Placements: In our college, about 60% of students are placed. The salary package offered is 3 LPA to 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies like Neospark. Godrej, Grauer & Weil, Cargill, etc., visit our campus. Every student must participate in an experiential learning program that includes internships with diverse feed companies and farms.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college provides good infrastructure. Labs are spacious. Classrooms are available. Wi-Fi is available. Digital classrooms are available. There are separate hostels for boys and girls. The quality of the food in the mess is good. A playground is available to play cricket, volleyball, and table tennis. Indoor games are available. A gym is available.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.F.Sc. in Fisheries Resources Management - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: The best college to pursue a master's in aquatic environment and fisheries resource management.

review_content.Placements: Few placements are there in the mangrove foundation. Students in the ELPA program are hired directly by private companies. 60% of students got placed. The highest package is about INR 10 lacs per annum. Neospark, Growel, Cargil Pvt. Ltd., etc. are the top recruiting companies. Every student had an internship last year (in the 7th and 8th semesters).
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has separate classrooms and labs for various departments. There is an old boys hostel for PG and Ph.D. students and new boys hostel for UG Boys. Sagarkanya Girls Hostel for UG, PG, and Ph.D. girls. A well-maintained mess facility for both boys and girls are there.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.F.Sc. in Fish Processing Technology - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: It is the best college for a master's degree in fish processing technology.

review_content.Placements: Almost 60% of students got placed in the private sector. The remaining 20% of students got placed in the government sector. The lowest salary package offered ranges between 3 LPA - 4 LPA. Various fish processing companies, medicine, and equipment companies recruit students. All students got internships at Gadre Marine Pvt. Ltd.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college building is very good. Classrooms are spacious in every department. Laboratories are available. There is a well-equipped library. Internet facilities are available on our campus. Reading rooms are air-conditioned. Separate hostels are available for both boys and girls. Mess is also available.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Fisheries Science - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Things you should know before taking admission in College of Fisheries, Ratnagiri.

content.Placements: The fisheries course is nice for those who own a pond or are planning to make a pond. Further, you can also work in the fisheries industry such as food processing or value addition industries. All jobs regarding the fisheries sector are available, and further, you can do Masters and Ph.D.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the boys' hostel is not good, but that of the girls' hostel is nice, and the fee is also less. The mess is present in both hostels, and the hostels are present near the college only. The library is present and provides students with all the required books and other books required for competitive exams.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Agriculture - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with the teachers and faculty members, as well as the infrastructure .

content.Placements: Students were placed based on their knowledge instead of percentage and the highest package was a 3.5 LPA from Sygenta with the job role of Sales Executive. Also for the internships, the company was Swal Corporation from Kopargaon and Sangamner, with a period of 3 months and a stipend of Rs 10k per month for marketing executives.
content.Infrastructure: The college includes Wi-Fi, a gym, high-tech labs, large classrooms, a library, a nursery, farms, poultry and a hostel. It is neat and clean, with moderate room sizes and beds, including food. There is also ground for Kabaddi, football, volleyball and kho-kho. The tournaments are held in college and all the fests are celebrated in college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. Hons. in Horticulture - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: All the facilities were given to the students.

content.Placements: 36 percent of students were placed in our course. 7 LPA was the highest, 2.3 LPA was the lowest, and 3 LPA was the average package offered in our course. The top recruiting companies for our course were Reliance, Remini, etc. 45% of students get internships through our course.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our institute was good. The institute was offering all the facilities to students, which were good, including Wi-Fi, labs, libraries, big classrooms, etc. The quality of the facilities in the hostel was good. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen was good to eat.

individual_reviews.course: M.F.Sc. in Aquaculture - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It is an excellent college for doing a master's degree.

content.Placements: In our college, about 60% of students are placed. The salary package offered is 3 LPA to 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies like Neospark. Godrej, Grauer & Weil, Cargill, etc., visit our campus. Every student must participate in an experiential learning program that includes internships with diverse feed companies and farms.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides good infrastructure. Labs are spacious. Classrooms are available. Wi-Fi is available. Digital classrooms are available. There are separate hostels for boys and girls. The quality of the food in the mess is good. A playground is available to play cricket, volleyball, and table tennis. Indoor games are available. A gym is available.

individual_reviews.course: M.F.Sc. in Fisheries Resources Management - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: The best college to pursue a master's in aquatic environment and fisheries resource management.

content.Placements: Few placements are there in the mangrove foundation. Students in the ELPA program are hired directly by private companies. 60% of students got placed. The highest package is about INR 10 lacs per annum. Neospark, Growel, Cargil Pvt. Ltd., etc. are the top recruiting companies. Every student had an internship last year (in the 7th and 8th semesters).
content.Infrastructure: The college has separate classrooms and labs for various departments. There is an old boys hostel for PG and Ph.D. students and new boys hostel for UG Boys. Sagarkanya Girls Hostel for UG, PG, and Ph.D. girls. A well-maintained mess facility for both boys and girls are there.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is located in an excellent place.
reviews.review_text: The hostel here is very good with a library, but the Wi-Fi facility is not available. There are trees in the hostel, and we study under them. reviews.review_heading: It has great opportunities to make our career in agriculture field.
reviews.review_text: Our university had good infrastructure. Labs had new machinery and implements. Classrooms and playground for sports and other activities were good enough. One should definitely visit our college. They will automatically know the campus placements and hostel facilities.

BTech students can become Engineers or can go for various other job profiles. The courses are divided into theory and practical. Students are taught Chemical Quality Assurance, By Products Technology, Quality and Safety Monitoring in the Dairy Industry, and others. Overall, BAU Ranchi is one of the top universities offering quality education to students. Below mentioned are some of the BAU Ranchi courses and their respective eligibility and BAU Ranchi fee:

overview_faqs.question: Why choose BAU Ranchi?
overview_faqs.answer: Birsa Agriculture University was established in 1981. This university is dedicated to advancing Agriculture, Forestry, Animal Husbandry, Dairy, and the Fishery sectors, especially for the resource-poor farmers present in Jharkhand. The below-mentioned are the reasons to choose this university:Multiple course offeringsBirsa Agriculture University is known for its undergraduate, postgraduate, PhD, certificate, and various other programmes. These programmes are provided across the Agriculture, Forestry, and various other streams. Multiple career opportunitiesBTech and BSc students are placed in top companies at top positions. BTech students can become Engineers or can go for various other job profiles.Good placementsThe below-mentioned are the Bihar Agricultural University placement statistics:ParticularsStatistics 2024No. of students placed (UG-4 year)109Median package offeredINR 6 LPANo. of students placed (UG-5 year)25Median package offeredINR 7.50 LPANote: The above-mentioned data is

overview_faqs.question: Is Birsa Agriculture University good?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, Birsa Agriculture University is a good college. Birsa Agriculture University has collaborated with various companies and organisations such as the Ministry of Agriculture, Government of India, Indian Council of Agriculture Research, New Delhi, Indian Agricultural Research Institute (IARI), New Delhi, and others. The collaborations provide greater knowledge seeking opportunities to students and are good for the college's reputation building as well.

review_summary.college_name: Birsa Agriculture University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Forestry - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Average for graduation, best for gathering life experiences, best one.

content.Placements: Forestry being a very unique subject and one of the most rare ones. The batch strength goes to just 50. This directly means that only 50 Forestry graduates are passing with this B.Sc. Forestry course every year from Jharkhand, as this is the sole college in our state. The placement cell of the college is genuinely very poor. However, the seniors never leave the juniors; they do help them to get better posts and achieve success!
content.Infrastructure: Top-notch! No doubts, the best one! The quality of the facilities of the hostel, the food quality of the hostel, and the quality of food available in the mess and canteen are the best among all departments of the university. Medical facilities are not up to the mark! Sports and games are okay, but there are no instructors!

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Veterinary Sciences and Animal Husbandry (B.V.Sc. & AH) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I would say that please use funds in the improvement of college, not improvement of own your houses.

content.Placements: There are no placement facilities, and we have to search for jobs and PG opportunities on our own. It's not that good. There is no reputation of this college in a good book, and there is no reach after graduation. Students have to do everything on their own, they don't even give us a college degree on time.
content.Infrastructure: The college is too old and hasn't undergone renovation. The hostel rooms are so small, 4 people are staying in 1 room in the girls' hostel, which is not good. The lab equipment is either not working or missing, and there are no medical facilities for students. The classrooms are also dirty. It's not so good what I'll say.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc.(Hons.) in Horticulture - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college ever.

content.Placements: This college's name is the College of Horticulture. This college provides 100% placements. The highest package is 10 LPA. Our college provides talented students with ability jobs. Students do very hard work. They are responsible to make sure success in life.
content.Infrastructure: This college offers a B.Sc. in Hons Horticulture. In the first semester, students will take 11 courses. Exams are divided into two parts: mid-term and end-term. We have Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, comfortable classrooms, and the best library. The hostel is well-maintained, with 24-hour electricity and security.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Agriculture - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Ranchi Agriculture College has good campus environment.

content.Placements: Only 5% of students which is around 4-5 students get selected. Banks like PNB, ICICI, and HDFC come to campus. An agriculture loan officer and clerk role is offered by JNR Bank. The salary package offered is 5 LPA. Our college provides 6 months of prior training with a stipend of approximately Rs. 6,000 per month.
content.Infrastructure: There is a Wi-Fi-enabled library with more than 20,00 books and daily newspapers in both English and Hindi. There are football and cricket grounds and basketball and badminton courts. Classrooms have smartboards and Wi-Fi. Labs are equipped with all the accessories and Wi-Fi. The campus has its hospital with basic amenities. Canteens and mess are available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc.(Hons.) in Agriculture - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Our college is the best because it gives more output with less resources .

content.Placements: 50% of the students are placed from my college. The highest package of my college is 5 Lacs. Kheti, TCS, is a fertilizer and pesticide company recruiting. Many students qualify government exams like NABARD, IBPS, AFO, and Krishi Vigyan Kendra. 99% of students go for higher education by qualifying ICAR PG in all over India.
content.Infrastructure: For each course, a separate lab is available. Good Wi-Fi system in academic building. Sufficient classrooms are available; each book of available courses is present in the library; separate study rooms are available for students with Wi-Fi facilities. Mess food is not good, but canteen food is good. There is a medical facility in the hostel; if emergencies occur, they will provide an ambulance van. A sports complex is present, and sports equipment is also available. Each year, TMPL is held in our college. Also, cultural programs are organised on different occasions.

admission_overview.college_name: Birsa Agriculture University Admission 2025: Fee, Dates, Eligibility & Application

paragraphs: BAU Ranchi admissionsare primarily entrance-based. The university conducts an entrance exam for admission to PG and doctoral courses. For UG programmes, the universityCombined Competitive Entrance Examinationconductedby I.C.A.R. V.C.I.at All India level and through theJharkhand Combined Competitive Entrance Examination Board. Birsa Agricultural University offers UG, PG and doctoral courses in multiple streams such as Agriculture, Science, Veterinary, etc. Interested candidates can apply online on the official website of BAU.

Birsa Agricultural University admission cycle begins inMaywith the opening of registration. Candidates can visit the official website of the university to apply for the preferred course. Below are keyBAU Ranchi admissionhighlights:
Particulars
BAU Ranchi Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
Admission status 2025
How to apply?
https://www.bauranchi.org/
Level of programmes offered
Popular programmes

Birsa Agricultural University admissions are based on entrance exam score. The minimum eligibility for all UG courses is Class 12 whereas, graduation is required to apply for PG programmes. Below are eligibility and selection criteria for topBAU Ranchi courses:

Birsa Agricultural University fee varies course-wise. The fee include multiple components such as tuition fee, caution deposit, hostel fee, etc. Some of the fee components are charged one-time, while some have to be paid semester-wise or annually, such as tuition fees. Find below BAU Ranchi fee for top courses:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.
Birsa Agricultural University seat intake is defined for each course. Out of the total intake some are reserved for reserved category candidates. Below is BAU Ranchi seat intake for top courses:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

Birsa Agriculture University admissions are based on university or state-level entrance exams. Candidates need to fulfil all the eligibility and selection requirements to apply for admission. Below is step-wise BAU Ranchi admission process:
STEP 1: BAU Ranchi Application Process 2025

Aspirants can download the application form online from the university website and submit it along with the specified documents and a non-refundable application fee of INR 1,500 (INR 750 for SC/ ST) for PG courses.
STEP 2: Selection

The university selects candidates for UG courses throughCombined Competitive Entrance Examination conducted by I.C.A.R. V.C.I.andJharkhand Combined Competitive Entrance Examination Board, Ranchi. The university conducts an entrance exam for PG and doctoral courses. The university prepares a merit list based on entrance test. The minimum cutoff marks for PG courses is 50% for General/ EWS/ OBC and 40% for SC/ ST/ PC)
STEP 3: Seat Allotment & Admission Confirmation

Once the selection is over, candidates are offered a seat in their preferred course.15%of the total seats are filled by a Combined Competitive Entrance Examination conducted by I.C.A.R. V.C.I. at All India level and85%of the total seats are filled by Jharkhand Combined Competitive Entrance Examination Board, Ranchi. For PG courses, the seats are offered based on the entrance exam conducted by the university. About 50% of the seats are reserved for students belonging from Jharkhand. Selected candidates need to pay course fee to confirm their seat in the university.
For more information about BAU - Birsa Agricultural University Admission Process check out the below video:

faqs.question: How is the placement of Birsa Agricultural University Ranchi?

faqs.question: What are the government job profiles available for BSc graduates?
faqs.answer: Because of their prestige, job security, competitive pay, and enticing benefits, public sector jobs are still in high demand in India. With a bachelor's degree in science, a candidate can apply for a wide range of public sector positions that complement their technical expertise and analytical abilities. A bachelor's degree in any scientific field opens doors to research jobs at national labs and institutes. For BSc graduates, the following are some common government job profiles : Government Job Profiles for BSc Graduates Research Scientist Clinical Research Specialist Lab Technician Biochemist Assistant Nurse Forest Department- IFS Officer FCI- Trainee RBI Grade B Officer LIC- AAO SBI PO Note: The information is sourced from external sites and may vary.

faqs.question: What is the median package offered to BSc (H) students of Birsa Agricultural University?
faqs.answer: As per the BAU Ranchi NIRF report 2023, the median package offered to UG (four year) places students stood at INR 6.40 LPA . The total students who participated in the drive were 330. Out of this, 27 students were placed . It must be noted that the mentioned placements data is not specific to BSc (H) course. Hence, is indicative.

faqs.question: Are internships offered at BAU - Birsa Agricultural University?
faqs.answer: Students have the option of applying to internships both offline and online. However, it is not compulsory except for the veterinary students. They have a compulsory internship of 6 months. However various trainings and industrial visits are organised regularly for the students' exposure and awareness. We have a full semester dedicated for the visit of these industries and institutes.

hostel_campus.college_name: Birsa Agriculture University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: University is having altogether 14 students hostels out of which 5 are for girls while rest 9 are for boys. All the hostels are equipped with modern facilities like computer, internet, telephone, common rooms with magazines, newspapers and XV. Each hostel is having indoor game facilities. One Gym has also been provided to boys and girls hostel. In each hostel, the mess is being managed by the University and equipped with modern essential items. Recently, two rooms in each hostel have been furnished, one as the office of Dy. Warden while another as guest room. Each hostel is connected with the generator to ensure uninterrupted power supply.

library.description: The Birsa Agricultural University, Kanke Ranchi is University having dedicated to the promotion of Education, Research, and Extension in Agriculture, Veterinary, Forestry, and Biotechnology. The library has the collection of 13,922 books,1,604 theses,1,682 bound journals, 20 periodicals/magazines, and also reprography facilities.  It has the largest collection on Agriculture, Veterinary, Forestry and Biotechnology and allied subjects. The library is growing very fast with computers, multimedia units and various electronics gadget due to the wholehearted financial provisions of the ICAR-NATP project. The library caters to the informational needs of Students, Teachers, Scientists and Research Scholars of all the educational institutions situated in Ranchi. The institute also has the facility of the digital library.

reviews.review_heading: Average for graduation, best for gathering life experiences, best one.
reviews.review_text: Top-notch! No doubts, the best one! The quality of the facilities of the hostel, the food quality of the hostel, and the quality of food available in the mess and canteen are the best among all departments of the university. Medical facilities are not up to the mark! Sports and games are okay, but there are no instructors!

reviews.review_heading: I would say that please use funds in the improvement of college, not improvement of own your houses.
reviews.review_text: The college is too old and hasn't undergone renovation. The hostel rooms are so small, 4 people are staying in 1 room in the girls' hostel, which is not good. The lab equipment is either not working or missing, and there are no medical facilities for students. The classrooms are also dirty. It's not so good what I'll say.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by College of Horticulture, West Singhbhum, Birsa Agricultural UniversityReviewed on 10 Apr 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It is the best college ever.
reviews.review_text: This college offers a B.Sc. in Hons Horticulture. In the first semester, students will take 11 courses. Exams are divided into two parts: mid-term and end-term. We have Wi-Fi, well-equipped labs, comfortable classrooms, and the best library. The hostel is well-maintained, with 24-hour electricity and security.

reviews.review_heading: Ranchi Agriculture College has good campus environment.
reviews.review_text: There is a Wi-Fi-enabled library with more than 20,00 books and daily newspapers in both English and Hindi. There are football and cricket grounds and basketball and badminton courts. Classrooms have smartboards and Wi-Fi. Labs are equipped with all the accessories and Wi-Fi. The campus has its hospital with basic amenities. Canteens and mess are available.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Tilka Manjhi Agriculture College, Godda, Birsa Agricultural UniversityReviewed on 24 Aug 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Our college is the best because it gives more output with less resources .
reviews.review_text: For each course, a separate lab is available. Good Wi-Fi system in academic building. Sufficient classrooms are available; each book of available courses is present in the library; separate study rooms are available for students with Wi-Fi facilities. Mess food is not good, but canteen food is good. There is a medical facility in the hostel; if emergencies occur, they will provide an ambulance van. A sports complex is present, and sports equipment is also available. Each year, TMPL is held in ou...

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by College of Horticulture, West Singhbhum, Birsa Agricultural UniversityReviewed on 30 Jul 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Horticulture College, BAU - new opportunity in Jharkhand.
reviews.review_text: As the college is newly built, the infrastructure is very new and good. The hostel is totally new. Classes are well furnished. Lab equipment is all available. All new instruments are installed. The library is also newly built, with all new books available for the Horticulture course. A mess facility is also available in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: BAU glance and its functioning.
reviews.review_text: This college has a decent infrastructure, college is equipped with Wi-Fi and has a well-maintained library which is open till 10 pm for boys and 8 pm for girls. Hostel infrastructure is bad, there is a scarcity of single rooms in boy's hostels and the same in girls' hostels. But the hostel fee is very less so it is adjustable.

reviews.review_heading: Overall Good to prepare for future competitive exams.
reviews.review_text: Whole college has Wi-Fi with fast secure internet. There labs as well but don't have enough equipment which are necessary. Library is well maintained and have enough books for a whole batch for courses as well as competitive exam. Hostel is free of cost but mess is having charge.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides us with all facilities. A gymnasium is available in our college. The food served in the mess is good. The ambulance is available 24X7. Our college has good security. The library has many books, journals, biographies, and tour experiences written by our seniors and professors. Our college is Wi-Fi enabled. Classrooms are equipped with air-conditioners, smart boards, and projectors.

reviews.review_heading: Good but Improvement required in the recruitment of teaching faculty.
reviews.review_text: Library facilities with free Wi-Fi, computers and Xerox facilities are available. Classrooms are equipped with smartclasses for smooth teaching. Plenty of labs available. Our hostels are equipped with gym, sports complex and the quality of food in our mess is decent. Medical facilities with ambulance are easily available. Every year annual sports meet is conducted.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for UG and PG courses.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good facilities like a hostel, Wi-Fi, etc. The lab should get improved. Medical facilities are not good. An ambulance is available in our college. You cannot play games in our college. A first aid box is available in our college. For any emergency, you have to book a van or auto because there is no driver in our college.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied with the reduced number of faculty members and the lack of placements.
reviews.review_text: It has one of the best infrastructures among the government institutes. There is a well-managed hostel with better facilities. Sports facilities are available. A good playground on which two games can be played at a time is available. There are air-conditioned lecture halls.

reviews.review_heading: Ranchi veterinary college, single government college in Jharkhand for pursuing veterinary course.
reviews.review_text: The facilities in the college laboratory are good and below average. Hostels are well maintained with spacious rooms, tables, chairs, cupboards, beds, etc. Each hostel has mess facilities with a canteen in boys' hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Great teachers have experience in practical but there is lack of teachers in our college.
reviews.review_text: Everything in the hostel and college is up to the mark. Our hostel and college have Wi-Fi. The labs are well-equipped with chemicals and proper materials which we require in the laboratory. The library contains our course-related and other useful books. The hostel is well-equipped with generator, washing machine, RO water purifier, and well maintained and hygienic hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Birsa Agricultural University.
reviews.review_text: Classroom is well maintained with a smart class, laboratory facility and all types of machinery are available in the department. All the facilities are available at the hostel like a generator, fully furnished rooms with attached bathroom, refrigerator, water cooler, etc. In some hostels, there are air-conditioners also.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about BAU - Birsa Agricultural University

paragraphs:
Ramchandra Chandravansi University course admissions are done based on entrance and merit depending on the course. The university accepts applications in offline mode only. Interested students can get theRamchandra Chandravansi Universityapplication form from the university campus. The form has to be submitted along with specified documents.
Students can pursue UG, PG, After 10th and Certificate programmes in fields of Engineering, Medicine and Health Sciences, Accounting and Commerce, Arts ( Fine / Visual / Performing ), Science, Teaching and Education and Nursing, and more. To know about the eligibility of Ramchandra Chandravansi University courses, students can visit the website.

Ramchandra Chandravansi University fee structure consists of caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, and more. The mode of payment for Ramchandra Chandravansi University fees is online. Interested candidates can check below for more details on Ramchandra Chandravansi University admission:

highlights.summary: Here are some additional updates regarding the Lakshmi Narain College of Technology, Indore:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Lakshmi Narain College of Technology, Indore is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time programmes from streams such as Engineering, Medicine & Health Sciences and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as B.E. / B.Tech, BCA and MBBS. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. The fee structure for the Lakshmi Narain College of Technology, Indore programmes is around INR 37,500 to 3,52,500.

faqs.answer: A:    Lakshmi Narain College of Technology, Indore is a good institution for B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, MBBS courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Major specialisation at Lakshmi Narain College of Technology, Indore are Automobile Engineering, Communications Engineering, Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Information Technology, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Structural Engineering.
faqs.question: Are there any specializations offered by Lakshmi Narain College of Technology, Indore?

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Choosing LNCT College for my education has been a decision I regret.

review_content.Placements: I'm quite disappointed with my college experience. It can be frustrating when expectations aren't met. As a final-year student at LNCT College, I would like to share my thoughts on the good and bad aspects of my college, as well as the admission process and criteria.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college lacks basic facilities. There are no adequate resources to support students' academic and extracurricular activities. The management of the college is very poor. There is a lack of organization and efficiency in handling student affairs. No Wi-Fi, poor labs, average classrooms—everything is disappointing. No canteen is there; I don't know about medical facilities; there are no sports.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Lakshmi Narain College of Technology, Indore.

review_content.Placements: About 50% to 60% of students were placed. The minimum salary package was 1.5 LPA, and the maximum was 4 LPA. Companies from Indore came here for mechanical students. Companies like Tech Mahindra, HP, HCL, etc. from other places like Pune came for IT students.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was good. Hostel facilities were not good. The hostel building was old. No students lived there. There was no canteen. Sports and games facilities were good. Our college participated in inter-college competitions.

review_summary.college_name: Lakshmi Narain College of Technology, Indore Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: College with good degree, but no placements.

content.Placements: There were no placements, and some placements they offered were just for the sake of showing in a very low-level startup company that was not earning itself, and for trainee roles. Otherwise, there was no focus on placements in this college. The degree was from RGPV, and this was the reason I joined this college. The placements were not good here. So, keep it in mind.
content.Infrastructure: College and lab infrastructure were good, but hostel was not good. Labs were very good with updated computers, an airy room, and lab assistants were also there. But the college hostel was not good, very low-quality rooms, not even labour class people could live there, still some students were living for the sake of less money.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The worst college, most of it is a waste of money, with no placements.

content.Placements: Placements are very low. The highest package was 3.6 LPA and the lowest was 1.8 LPA, and there was almost no support from the college placement cell. Most of the professors were also carefree and didn't put too much effort into teaching the students. Placements were the worst, and I have never seen worse placements than here.
content.Infrastructure: The building is too old with almost no amenities, and there is no maintenance of things. There were projectors, but they did not work, and the floors were broken. There is always some construction going on in the campus. Parking was not proper, and the canteen was sometimes open and mostly closed, and didn’t offer any good food.

individual_reviews.title: Choosing LNCT College for my education has been a decision I regret.

individual_reviews.title: Review of Lakshmi Narain College of Technology, Indore.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I am not satisfied because of many reasons and the average placements in 2022.

content.Placements: In our college, around 30% of students are placed in MNCs. The lowest salary package offered is 4 LPA and the highest salary package offered is 10 LPA. Top recruiting companies like TCS, Infosys, and many more MNCs visit our campus. A maximum of one student gets a free online internship, and if they want an offline internship, they must pay for it. The top role offered is the developer.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides average facilities, such as Wi-Fi in the library, but only to college teachers. Our classrooms are average, but the library is the best in our college. Our college canteen facility is not available.

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

description: Lakshmi Narain College of Technology, Indore cutoff 2025 is finally out for aspirants seeking admission to the BTech and Integrated BTech courses. The JoSAA Round 1 seat allotment result 2025 has been released as opening and closing ranks across different categories belonging to the AI and HS quotas. Candidates can scroll down to this page to view the Lakshmi Narain College of Technology, Indore JEE Main cutoff 2025 for various specialisations and categories. A few more updates are below:
NTA has released the JEE Main Result 2024 for Session 2. Candidates can download their scorecard from the NTA website jeemain.nta.ac.in.
The Joint Seat Allocation Authority (JoSAA) will start the registration for JEE Main Counselling 2024 on June 10. A total of 6 rounds of JEE Main 2024 counselling will be conducted.

Lakshmi Narain College of Technology, Indore cutoff 2025 was released via MPBE entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General HS category students, the last round cutoff range was between 925714 and 1215789 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 925714, B.E. in Information Technology turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission. In the first round, the cutoff rank for the same branch was 1351881.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General HS category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 925714.
For more categories, rounds and quotas, candidates must use the provided filters.
Some of the important dates related to JEE Main 2026 for admission are provided below. Candidates can keep track of the upcoming dates to be eligible for admission.
The cutoff PDFs below can be downloaded to view the cutoff details of the last three years for multiple rounds. This will help students understand the past years' cutoff trends.

To make an informed decision students must compare different colleges accepting JEE Main for admission. The given below comparison data is based on the JEE Main last round cutoff data. The cutoff is for the General HS category.

Considering the Lakshmi Narain College of Technology, Indore B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025, the top three most competitive specialisations for General HS category students were B.E. in Information Technology, B.E. in Mechanical Engineering and B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering, with last-round closing ranks of 925714, 969827, and 1137967, respectively.

reviews.review_heading: College with good degree, but no placements.
reviews.review_text: College and lab infrastructure were good, but hostel was not good. Labs were very good with updated computers, an airy room, and lab assistants were also there. But the college hostel was not good, very low-quality rooms, not even labour class people could live there, still some students were living for the sake of less money.

reviews.review_heading: The worst college, most of it is a waste of money, with no placements.
reviews.review_text: The building is too old with almost no amenities, and there is no maintenance of things. There were projectors, but they did not work, and the floors were broken. There is always some construction going on in the campus. Parking was not proper, and the canteen was sometimes open and mostly closed, and didn’t offer any good food.

reviews.review_heading: Choosing LNCT College for my education has been a decision I regret.
reviews.review_text: The college lacks basic facilities. There are no adequate resources to support students' academic and extracurricular activities. The management of the college is very poor. There is a lack of organization and efficiency in handling student affairs. No Wi-Fi, poor labs, average classrooms—everything is disappointing. No canteen is there; I don't know about medical facilities; there are no sports.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Lakshmi Narain College of Technology, Indore.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was good. Hostel facilities were not good. The hostel building was old. No students lived there. There was no canteen. Sports and games facilities were good. Our college participated in inter-college competitions.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied because of many reasons and the average placements in 2022.
reviews.review_text: The college provides average facilities, such as Wi-Fi in the library, but only to college teachers. Our classrooms are average, but the library is the best in our college. Our college canteen facility is not available.

reviews.review_heading: Review of LNCT (Bhopal) Indore campus.
reviews.review_text: A hostel facility is available in our college. Our college has an excellent hostel facility, rooms, and a Wi-Fi facility in the hostel. There is no ragging. The campus is greenery. There is a food court on campus. The rooms and the food are very low. For everything, we have to pay for our own. Sports classes are held every week. They have books. Our memory is sharp to learn theories so you can read and learn from the book only and no practical things.

reviews.review_heading: If you take admission in this college then it will be good for your career.
reviews.review_text: The Hostel is very good. Boys are allotted hostels in the campus itself for one year only while girls are allotted hostels for four years. It has four hostel buildings, two for boys and two for girls. The room quality is very good, it's more like a three-star hotel. Each room has its attached washroom, a balcony of decent size. Three students are accommodated in each room. Mess food is between intermediate and good. One can't expect much from mess food. The hostel fee is also affordable.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of the teachers.
reviews.review_text: There are separate buildings for MBA and BA. The campus is good. There is a huge library. Wi-Fi is available. The classrooms are spacious enough for students. The hostel is good enough, and the food quality is decent.

reviews.review_heading: Overall the college rating is average .
reviews.review_text: The building of our college is extremely good and there are many class room and having smart classes facilities. There is quite low facilities for students like there is no purified water and no Wi-Fi connection. The quality of food is average and the facilities of hostel is also average.

reviews.review_heading: An honest review of LNCT Indore.
reviews.review_text: Our course infrastructure is designed according to today's industrial needs. We have well qualified and experienced teachers. We have good facilities of Wi-Fi, computer lab and a well-maintained library where students find their desired books. The infrastructure of our hostel is pretty good, and the quality of the food available in the mess is quite satisfying compared to other mess facilities. Basic medical facilities are available in our college. There are several sports events organised by ou...

reviews.review_heading: It is an above-average college, and some things need to be improved.
reviews.review_text: We have a library, ground, auditorium, sports complex, canteen and all the labs. The infrastructure is good. The food quality is not impressive. The college has all the necessary infrastructure, facilities and equipment. It is well maintained with all the facilities in the classrooms, laboratories, libraries, sports center and hostel. The hostel provides Wi-Fi facilities as well. The area is clean and hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied with college because of many reasons.
reviews.review_text: Facilities provided at our college are not very excellent, but its infrastructure is excellent. Food served in the mess is moderately good, but there is no canteen in the LNCT, Indore. Medical facilities provided are good.  Sports facilities are moderate. Overall, some facilities are very poor, and some are moderate.

reviews.review_heading: I am highly satisfied with our college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good, and all the facilities like Wi-Fi campus and labs are available. Classrooms are very spacious, with smart classes. The hostel facilities are normal, but there are problems in mess and cleanliness.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. The library is huge, and almost 500 students can study at a time. Wi-Fi facility is also available in college and hostel. Quality of hostel is normal. There is no raging in the hostel. The mess facility is not good. Lab facility of the computer science department is very good.

reviews.review_heading: Placement is very good in lnct.
reviews.review_text: Computer Science and engineering infrastructure is very good lab is in good maintenance by college management. In college campus Wi-Fi facility is available but not in hostel. Library is also a very large in size almost 400 students can sit together in library.

admission_overview.college_name: St.Joseph University Course Admissions 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Selection Process

paragraphs: St.Joseph University admissions 2025 areopenfor various courses. The university offers courses in the stream of Management, Engineering, Computer Application, Medical, etc. St.Joseph University admissions aremerit-based. Candidates can choose to join programmes such asBTech, MBA, MCA, BCom, MSW, etc., among multiple specialisations. The application mode atSt.Joseph Universityis completely online. Candidates who meet the educational requirements of the course are offered direct admission. More details around St.Joseph University admission 2025 are explained in the article below.

For UG & PG courses, St.Joseph University offers direct admission. Aspirants need to fulfil the basic eligibility criteria as per the course requirements. Tabulated below are the course-wise eligibility and selection criteria forSt.Joseph University course admission 2025:
Check below the detailed steps for the St.Joseph University admission process 2025:
Step 1: Application Process

St.Joseph University's application process is conducted in an online mode. Candidates willing to get admission to any of the UG or PG courses at the university are required to apply online and pay an application fee ofINR 500. The application form is available on the official website of St.Joseph University.
Step 2: Selection Rounds

As per the St.Joseph University admission process, candidates are offered direct admission based on their merit of the last qualifying exam. Aspirants need to fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria to be eligible to get shortlisted for their desired programme. The university selects students based on their merit scores and filled applications.
Step 3: Final Admission
In the final steps, candidates who qualify the selection process must pay a certain amount of fee to confirm their seats for the course they applied for.

reviews.review_heading: Average facilities and all other things.
reviews.review_text: Average facilities are available in our college. All technologies are much proper, but all things are available like labs, classrooms, library, Wi-Fi, etc. Hostel facilities are also average, food in the mess, medical facilities, etc. Everything is average.

reviews.review_heading: Recommended – only if getting a degree is the only priority.
reviews.review_text: Llimited number of classrooms, hospital nearby, there is a cellphone jammer so no proper connectivity. No IEEE, GDGC, or any student communities. Only NSS is available for securing activity points. There is no platform in the college to build industry-demand skills.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Petroleum Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: I'm satisfied with faculty but not with infrastructure and canteen.

review_content.Placements: The problem is most of the students did not belong to the core field, so they are changing to the core field. Like we studied petroleum, but there are no proper and enough jobs in India for petroleum engineers. There are no good placements for our course like some students are getting a salary of Rs. 40,000 per month abroad, while some are getting a salary of Rs. 15,000 per month. However, these are starting salaries. If we study in the core field for 5 years, then we will get very high salaries. We have to do some special courses, and even we do them also, we need some reference to get placements. There are no good placements in our core field.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Biomedical Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: It was absolutely satisfying because of the good faculty and good placements.

review_content.Placements: 85% of students were placed in my course, with the highest package being 1 LPA, the lowest at 20,000, and the average package at 50,000. 90% of students got internships, and the hospitals involved were Relax and Ray Hospital. The top roles offered included senior biomedical engineer, junior biomedical engineer, sales and service representative, and medical coder.
review_content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure was quite impressive, with facilities like the auditorium, classrooms, library, laboratories, etc. The hostel is like heaven to stay in, with a lot of restrictions. Sports like cricket, volleyball, football, etc., are available. The food was absolutely better.

faqs.answer: Rajiv Gandhi College of Engineering has courses such as M.E./M.Tech, B.Tech to offer. These courses are in the stream of Engineering. Rajiv Gandhi College of Engineering offers specializations such as M.E./M.Tech specializations in Communications Engineering, Electronics Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, B.Tech specializations in Civil Engineering, Automobile Engineering, Biomedical Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Petroleum Engineering.
faqs.question: Q: Which courses does Rajiv Gandhi College of Engineering offer to students?

faqs.answer: Rajiv Gandhi College of Engineering has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityM.E./M.TechCandidate must have completed B.E/B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engg. Candidate belonging to reserved category must have 45% in qualifying examination. Candidate who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE are also eligible. AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field. Candidates with B.E./B.Tech. degrees obtained through Distance/Weekend mode are not eligible. Candidates with degree obtained without studying 10th/12th Std. or 3 years degree programme are not eligible. Candidates appearing for the final semester/year are also eligible.B.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu. Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate. Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply. Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced. Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile. Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.
