overview_faqs.question: Is Rajiv Gandhi College of Engineering a known college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Rajiv Gandhi College of Engineering is a well-known institution for M.E./M.Tech, B.Tech courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha verified reviews, Rajiv Gandhi College of Engineering has a rating of 3 on the basis of reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 3.5 on campuslife, 3 on placements, 3 on faculty and 3 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Rajiv Gandhi College of Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Rajiv Gandhi College of Engineering is overall good college.

content.Placements: Rajiv Gandhi College of Engineering is best placement college. In this college conduct more placement interviews in every year. All students got good jobs. In reputed companies like. Honda, TVS, Yamaha, etc.95 percentage of students got internships in 2021.
content.Infrastructure: This college has good hostel facilities. Students are cannot leave the hostels without permission of parents. More security facilities available. CCTV and Wi-Fi facilities also available. Good classrooms, modern laboratories facility also available in this college. Mess foods is good.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Biomedical Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: It is an average engineering college with average placements.

content.Placements: Around 70% of students get placed. The highest package offered is around 3.5 LPA. Zifo is the major recruiter. Almost everyone does an internship in Saveetha Hospitals as a biomedical engineer. We have one-day industrial visits to hospitals and manufacturing industries.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are good with sufficient ventilation. The library is medium. The labs are pretty average with very old equipment. The biomedical department has a separate block. The hostel part is good, but the food is not much good. A small canteen is available with a few bakery items.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Petroleum Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: I'm satisfied with faculty but not with infrastructure and canteen.

content.Placements: The problem is most of the students did not belong to the core field, so they are changing to the core field. Like we studied petroleum, but there are no proper and enough jobs in India for petroleum engineers. There are no good placements for our course like some students are getting a salary of Rs. 40,000 per month abroad, while some are getting a salary of Rs. 15,000 per month. However, these are starting salaries. If we study in the core field for 5 years, then we will get very high salaries. We have to do some special courses, and even we do them also, we need some reference to get placements. There are no good placements in our core field.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Biomedical Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It was absolutely satisfying because of the good faculty and good placements.

content.Placements: 85% of students were placed in my course, with the highest package being 1 LPA, the lowest at 20,000, and the average package at 50,000. 90% of students got internships, and the hospitals involved were Relax and Ray Hospital. The top roles offered included senior biomedical engineer, junior biomedical engineer, sales and service representative, and medical coder.
content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure was quite impressive, with facilities like the auditorium, classrooms, library, laboratories, etc. The hostel is like heaven to stay in, with a lot of restrictions. Sports like cricket, volleyball, football, etc., are available. The food was absolutely better.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I am very satisfied with this college.

content.Placements: Placements are average. Many students got placed in this course. Internships are not offered in our college. Students who score 9.5 CGPA are eligible for placements. The minimum salary package offered was 1 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is not well developed. There is no proper maintenance on our campus. Canteen is average. Classrooms are well-maintained. The mentors are not good. Sports are not conducted in this college.
content.Faculty: Faculty members are good. Non-qualified teachers are also working in this college. There are no industrial visits. Semester exams are very difficult. We have to study well to score good marks.

admission_process.title: Rajiv Gandhi College of Engineering Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Rajiv Gandhi College of Engineering admissionis a blend of merit and entrance-based, depending on the course. The institute considers exam scores for certain courses, while merit achieved in the last qualifying exam is considered to shortlist students for the remaining programmes. Students can pursue a variety of courses at UG and PG levels.

Some of the exams accepted by the institute are GATE, CEETA, and TNEA, and more. Students must secure a valid score in the relevant exam, and meet the eligibility. Rajiv Gandhi College of Engineering fees generally range betweenINR 50,000 - 2,00,000. For more updates regardingRajiv Gandhi College of Engineering coursesand their respective admission criteria, check below:

courses_data.name: Rajiv Gandhi College of Engineering B.E. / B.Tech Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Rajiv Gandhi College of Engineering B.E. / B.Techis offered to candidates at the UG level. Candidates are required to participate in the entrance-based admission process to be considered for the final admission offer. Candidates are shortlisted for the B.E. / B.Tech programme based on their performance in the entrance exam. Candidates who qualify in the admission process are eligible to secure their seat in the 4 years programme.

courses_data.name: Rajiv Gandhi College of Engineering M.E./M.Tech Admission 2025
courses_data.description: TheM.E./M.TechatRajiv Gandhi College of Engineeringis a 2 years programme offered to the students in the field of Engineering. Admission to this course is offered based on a valid score in GATE and CEETA. Students can choose from 3 specialisations such as Communications Engineering, Electronics Engineering and Computer Science Engineering among others. To complete the Rajiv Gandhi College of Engineering admission process for the 2025 batch, selected candidates must pay the applicable course fee ofINR 50,000.

faqs.question: How can I get into Rajiv Gandhi College of Engineering for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
Rajiv Gandhi College of Engineering has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityM.E./M.TechCandidate must have completed B.E/B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engg.
Candidate belonging to reserved category must have 45% in qualifying examination.
Candidate who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE are also eligible.
AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field.
Candidates with B.E./B.Tech. degrees obtained through Distance/Weekend mode are not eligible.
Candidates with degree obtained without studying 10th/12th Std. or 3 years degree programme are not eligible.
Candidates appearing for the final semester/year are also eligible.B.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu.
Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also app

faqs.question: How many seats are available at Rajiv Gandhi College of Engineering for all courses combined?
faqs.answer: The overall seats available across all courses offered by Rajiv Gandhi College of Engineering is up to 372. Good thing to know is that Rajiv Gandhi College of Engineering has courses which are approved by prominent Government bodies like AICTE.

overview_faqs.question: What is the average BTech Computer Science Engineering salary in India?
overview_faqs.answer: The average BTech CSE salary for graduates in India can range between INR 4 LPA and INR 12 LPA. The scope of the BTech CSE programme in India is excellent and hence the starting salary packages offered by recruiters are also high as compared to some other engineering courses.The salary depends on factors like the years of experience you hold, your academic qualification, skill set, etc. Once you enter the industry and get some years of experience in hand, you will get a higher salary package. But, in the starting of your career journey, you can expect between INR 4 LPA and INR 6 LPA.

faqs.question: What is the average BTech Computer Science Engineering salary in India?
faqs.answer: TheaverageBTech CSEsalary for graduates in India can range between INR 4 LPA and INR 12 LPA. The scope of the BTech CSE programme in India is excellent and hence the starting salary packages offered by recruiters are also high as compared to some other engineering courses.The salary depends on factors like the years of experience you hold, your academic qualification, skill set, etc. Once you enter the industry and get some years of experience in hand, you will get a higher salary package. But, in the starting of your career journey, you can expect between INR 4 LPA and INR 6 LPA.

reviews.review_heading: Apollo Engineering College is one of the best engineering colleges.
reviews.review_text: Apollo Engineering College has more spacious classroom facilities, and more departmental hi-tech laboratory facilities are available in this college. This college has Wi-Fi and CCTV facilities. The library is also well-stocked. The hostel facilities are very good, and the hostel food and canteen food are tasty and healthy. There are also some sports grounds available at this college.

reviews.review_heading: Apollo Engineering College is absolutely the best engineering college.
reviews.review_text: This college is placed in a good eco friendly environment. The classrooms are very comfortable for the students. Many labs, and good library facilities are provided by the college. Our college hostels are maintained very clean. Mess food is hygienic. A canteen facility is also available in this college.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college for middle-class students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. It provides good faculty members to improve students' life and growth every day. It has 32 Mbps, and the Wi-Fi speed on campus is good. The sports have played a major role in it, and the hostel and canteen are also very good, because it has quality food and infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: The distance from our college to Poonamallee is very long to travel.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is not good here, and the rooms are not much good. There will be mosquitoes and many problems, and the food served will also the worst. If you are concerned about your health, I recommended you not to join the hostel as it makes you unhealthy.

reviews.review_heading: Very good facilities and curriculum.
reviews.review_text: In our college we had well-equipped infrastructure, In our department of computer Science engineering we had our own computer labs with Wi-Fi which is very helpful. There are libraries for each departments and also each department had their own labs and facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Our college advertises that it will provide 90% placements, but it provides only 20% placements.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility, lab, classrooms and library are fine here. The quality of the food served is the worst, and the maintenance of the canteen is also the worst. Medical facilities are average, and sports facilities are also average. Games are not played on the campus. Our college hostel is the worst. Hostel rooms are also the worst because there was no maintenance.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good infrastructure, well-trained faculty members and assures 100% placements.
reviews.review_text: My course is computer science. Our computer lab and Wi-Fi are good facilities provided on the campus. The library looks good, and smart rooms are available in our college. They are excellent. The hostel has well architect, and Wi-Fi facility is available in the hostel. The food served in the hostel is very good.

reviews.review_heading: I am highly satisfied because of friendly faculty members.
reviews.review_text: There are good facilities for exams, like practical exams, but there are no proper lab facilities. Food served in the canteen is not good. Something the food provided will be good but not daily. Even sometimes, there will be no food.

reviews.review_heading: Poor college in terms of fee. The management has arrogant attitude.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good infrastructure, but they collect money from students and build their college. They'll not provide the scholarships provided by the government to the students. I have studied Computer Science engineering. No practical knowledge is provided to the students.

reviews.review_heading: I request you to join in this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is really good. We have many blocks in our college. We have enough canteens. The buildings are well maintained. Still, they are trying to improve them, which makes them really good. We have a canteen in each building. Each floor will be well-maintained and cleaned.

reviews.review_heading: The review of Apollo Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: They were providing a 32 Mbps high-speed internet net on the campus. It is the biggest library in Asia, and up to 100000 books are available. The college has a very good infrastructure with good quality education to the students. They are providing all kind of athletics. They provide Yogi scholarship and good quality education to school students.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Apollo's quality of teaching.
reviews.review_text: I should definitely say about the infrastructure of the is been stylish and it made up of german technology which can be money worth completion of designs and college have another branches in medical sector that Apollo pharmacy college to prevent lives of th people.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: AIEMS - Amruta Institute of Engineering & Management Sciences offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.E. / B.Tech and UG Diploma. Whereas, at PG level, AIEMS - Amruta Institute of Engineering & Management Sciences offers courses such as MBA/PGDM. Amruta Engineering College fee structure for all the courses is around INR 12,810 to 7,44,444.

faqs.answer: A:    AIEMS - Amruta Institute of Engineering & Management Sciences is a good institution for B.E. / B.Tech, UG Diploma, MBA/PGDM courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure, faculty and placements.

review_content.Placements: Last year's CSE department had good placement. Out of 60 students, almost 40+ got placed. Most have been recruited in Wipro, TCS, etc. Most of us have been placed as Software engineer fresher. Everyone gets for internship in various reputed companies and in startups also. Packages received are between 3 to 7 lakh per annum.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is one of the best in this college. The whole campus is covered with multiple Wi-Fi spots and they offer high-speed connections too of 100 mbps. Labs are equipped with industry standard equipments. Classrooms are equipped with the best facility. Library is filled with the study material that one could ever need.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is good for getting degree.

review_content.Placements: Students placed from past years were very few and active. There are only off-campus placements. Placement team is quite supportive but depends on the student. Only few students are actively concerned about their future.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is well and good as far as the buildings are concerned, but facilities are not up to mark like a library with very less books. So the one who goes 1st will get the book as there are only 5 to 6 books of the same title for a strength of 50 students. Wi-Fi is always a hit-and-miss situation, you can't ever rely on it as it is switched off when you need it the most. Classrooms are average, but labs are having computers of the 1990s, they barely even work. Being CS students, computers should be upgraded for us.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I'm satisfied with the college and enjoyed my engineering life.

content.Placements: Students' placement in our course is just60%. The placement in other branches like mech is too low for the students only CSE, ECE, EEE, and ISE, only these branches can make around 60% of placements for the students but civil and mech are too poor in placement.
content.Infrastructure: Excellent fine labs and 24/7 Wi-Fi are available. Every sport is available. The quality of the facilities in a hostel is hygienic and students are under camera surveillance and the quality of mess is too healthy for the students. In sports, we can play both outdoor and indoor games in our college.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and faculty

content.Placements: 60% of the college students will get placed and the highest package is 6 lakh and the average is 3.6. Top recruiting companies are IBM , TCS , Accenture 90% got internship from rooman technologies and still companies are arriving for the drive in the last.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good and the wifi is available in every floor and the labs are well equipped. The library is good for reading new books arrival and canteen is good as it serves good south Indian meals. The hostel contains the good infrastructure.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure, faculty and placements.

content.Placements: Last year's CSE department had good placement. Out of 60 students, almost 40+ got placed. Most have been recruited in Wipro, TCS, etc. Most of us have been placed as Software engineer fresher. Everyone gets for internship in various reputed companies and in startups also. Packages received are between 3 to 7 lakh per annum.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is one of the best in this college. The whole campus is covered with multiple Wi-Fi spots and they offer high-speed connections too of 100 mbps. Labs are equipped with industry standard equipments. Classrooms are equipped with the best facility. Library is filled with the study material that one could ever need.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Our college is good for getting degree.

content.Placements: Students placed from past years were very few and active. There are only off-campus placements. Placement team is quite supportive but depends on the student. Only few students are actively concerned about their future.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is well and good as far as the buildings are concerned, but facilities are not up to mark like a library with very less books. So the one who goes 1st will get the book as there are only 5 to 6 books of the same title for a strength of 50 students. Wi-Fi is always a hit-and-miss situation, you can't ever rely on it as it is switched off when you need it the most. individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: I'm not at all satisfied, and it's not worth the money. You can get much better colleges than this.

content.Placements: Placements here are conducted every year and internships as well (paid or unpaid). What I have often seen is that students from mechanical, electrical, civil or non-CSE branches don't get placed in their core companies. Instead, after 4 years, they spend their time learning web development to get placed in the IT sector. Companies like Wipro, Cisco, etc., visit our college for placements. But I have seen my seniors facing difficulty to qualify in the interview. However, the highest salary package of around 6 LPA-7 LPA is offered in our college.
content.Infrastructure: I have stayed one year in the hostel and had decided not to stay because there is no hygiene in the hostel. The food provided in the canteen is bad, and you may have to face severe consequences of it. The library has all the reference books provided by VTU, and there is a Wi-Fi facility in the hostel. Classrooms have a fine infrastructure and are spacious and manageable. In the labs, most of the time, equipment does not work, and software won't be downloaded into the computer systems.

hostel_campus.college_name: AIEMS - Amruta Institute of Engineering & Management Sciences Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: The hostel gives facilities for a common study/library area, a TV room, internet room and an indoor play area. A caretaker’s room also is accommodated at each floor.Each of the students would have a combined Bed- Study unit designed on the lines of those found in a few foreign institutions consisting of a study table, a wardrobe, a book rack and a single bed with individual lighting and electrical socket points with computer points.Each room will have 3/5 member accommodation.

library.description: The Library is fully computerized using the EASYLIB software’s in all the books, Journals and identity cards have been bar-coded. At present there are 2777 titles, 11198 volumes, 72 journals, and many reference books are prescribed as per the VTU scheme and syllabus.The seating capacity of the library is about 200. Library facilities is available from 8 am to 8 pm on all working days.

cafeteria.description: A fully equipped canteen serving delicious hot food open from 7.00 am to 9.00 pm, is available for the benefit of students to indulge in throughout the semester. An additional food court to cater to multiple tastes is also available within the campus for the convenience of students coming from different parts of India.

A caretaker’s room also is accommodated at each floor.Each of the students would have a combined Bed- Study unit designed on the lines of those found in a few foreign institutions consisting of a study table, a wardrobe, a book rack and a single bed with individual lighting and electrical socket points with computer points.Each room will have 3/5 member accommodation.

labs.description: Available Facilities: Civil Engineering Lab, Chemistry Lab, Computer Lab, Electrical Lab, Electronics Lab, Language Lab, Mechanical Lab, Physics Lab, Material Testing Lab, CAD & CAM/Automation Lab, Heat Transfer Lab, Control Systems Lab, Power Electronics lab, Logic Design Lab, Power System Simulation Lab

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with the college and enjoyed my engineering life.
reviews.review_text: Excellent fine labs and 24/7 Wi-Fi are available. Every sport is available. The quality of the facilities in a hostel is hygienic and students are under camera surveillance and the quality of mess is too healthy for the students. In sports, we can play both outdoor and indoor games in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and faculty
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good and the wifi is available in every floor and the labs are well equipped. The library is good for reading new books arrival and canteen is good as it serves good south Indian meals. The hostel contains the good infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, faculty and placements.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is one of the best in this college. The whole campus is covered with multiple Wi-Fi spots and they offer high-speed connections too of 100 mbps. Labs are equipped with industry standard equipments. Classrooms are equipped with the best facility. Library is filled with the study material that one could ever need.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good for getting degree.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is well and good as far as the buildings are concerned, but facilities are not up to mark like a library with very less books. So the one who goes 1st will get the book as there are only 5 to 6 books of the same title for a strength of 50 students.  Wi-Fi is always a hit-and-miss situation, you can't ever rely on it as it is switched off when you need it the most. Classrooms are average, but labs are having computers of the 1990s, they barely even work. Being CS students, computer...

reviews.review_heading: I'm not at all satisfied, and it's not worth the money. You can get much better colleges than this.
reviews.review_text: I have stayed one year in the hostel and had decided not to stay because there is no hygiene in the hostel. The food provided in the canteen is bad, and you may have to face severe consequences of it. The library has all the reference books provided by VTU, and there is a Wi-Fi facility in the hostel. Classrooms have a fine infrastructure and are spacious and manageable. In the labs, most of the time, equipment does not work, and software won't be downloaded into the computer systems.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Good food is served in the canteen, and there is the best Wi-Fi facility. Our college provides labs, classrooms, a library, sports, games and a good hostel for students. There are also other very good facilities and infrastructure, so students can read very well.

reviews.review_heading: AIEMS is one of the best colleges in Bangalore outskirts, i.e., Bidadi industrial area.
reviews.review_text: Our AIEMS college campus is spread over 10 to 15 acres with a beautiful atmosphere ideally suited for technical and management studies. Infrastructure and facilities available on the campus are amongst the best. It is a self-contained campus comprising of everything that students on the campus would require. If you once visit the campus, you can enjoy in its infrastructure. All classrooms, libraries and laboratories are spacious and hygienic. Labs are well-equipped with relevant apparatus.

reviews.review_heading: I am really happy to be a student of AIEMS.
reviews.review_text: There is a very good mess here. The maintenance of the hostel is pretty good with all the facilities like Wi-Fi, water and cleanliness. The library has all kinds of books which are needed for students and also upgraded computer systems. Wi-Fi facilities are also provided for students.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with a low fee, and I suggest others to choose the mechanical course.
reviews.review_text: Our college campus is peaceful, but it is very far and hard to reach without own vehicle. College bus facility is available, so it gets relief in reaching the college on time. Our college also has a hostel and canteen with pure vegetarian food. Hostel and college have Wi-Fi, very good labs and classrooms for good learning.

reviews.review_heading: Very good college but only disadvantage is the location.
reviews.review_text: Entire college is Wi-Fi enabled. Hostel has dedicated rooms with attached bathrooms and toilet. The food in the canteen is okay, only pure vegetarian food is provided. Don't expect too much. It is okay. Campus is disturbance free and in a peaceful environment.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has very good teaching and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Free Wi-Fi is enabled on campus and hostel. There are spacious classrooms and well-equipped labs and library with lots of books and magazines with Indian and foreign authors and publications. Hygienic food is served provided in the canteen. There are clean and spacious hostel rooms with 24x7 hot water facility. Indoor and outdoor games like chess, volleyball, softball, etc., are provided for all the students.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college which has a good environment to study and also a well-furnished hostel.
reviews.review_text: There is a well-furnished hostel with attached bathrooms and Wi-Fi facility. Our college has a gymnasium room and good sports facilities. Students of our college participate in university-level sports. For sports like softball, volleyball, kabaddi and kho-kho, the coaching is provided by PED. Water is available for 24 hours, but non-vegetarian is not provided in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: If your rank is too low and you want to do engineering in just 2 Lacs, this is the best college.
reviews.review_text: The campus area considerably average, but the way they have laid out plan and built is very odd. The college is very small compared to the two large hostels beside it. Each floor of the academic building is dedicated to a different department, but I must say that everything is readily available and in contended required amount. Neither, there are many facilities, nor very less. Labs have required instruments for all students, and they are very well-equipped.

Everything is just good. Faculty members are good and experienced. Interesting interactive sessions are organized in college. College campus is very good which provides good environment for students. Facility provided by college like library, computer labs and activities are just awesome. Everything is just good. Faculty members are good and experienced. Interesting interactive sessions are organized in college. College campus is very good which provides good environment for students. Facility provided by college like library, computer labs and activities are just awesome.

College doesn’t have any basic facilities. It’s just like govt. Kannada schools facilities. College fees is less and facilities are also less. The college is good for those who wish to get degree at less cost but don’t need better college life better faculties. Food in the canteen is worst. College doesn’t have any basic facilities. faqs.answer: Visakha Institute of Engineering and Technology provides programmes including B.Arch, MBA/PGDM, B.E. / B.Tech, UG Diploma, M.E./M.Tech, After 10th Diploma in streams such as Architecture & Planning, Business & Management Studies, Engineering, and are excellent for students to build their careers. faqs.question: Q: Which courses does Visakha Institute of Engineering and Technology offer?

faqs.answer: Visakha Institute of Engineering and Technology offers admission to most of the programmes based on state-level entrance exams. The institute considers scores in Andhra Pradesh ICET, Andhra Pradesh EAMCET, Andhra Pradesh PGECET, etc. for admission to specific courses. Besides, the selection for BBA and BCA courses is based on merit of the aspirants in the last qualifying exam. Candidates need to apply for Andhra Pradesh OAMDC for BBA and BCA programmes.
faqs.question: Q: Can I get direct admission at VIET Visakhapatnam?

faqs.answer: Visakha Institute of Engineering and Technology admission to most of the programmes is entrance-based. The institute considers the merit of the aspirants in the last qualifying exam for BBA and BCA programmes. Admission to BTech and M.Tech courses based on AP EAMCET and AP PGECET, respectively. For admission to MBA, candidates have a valid score in Andhra Pradesh ICET.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: There is good infrastructure and faculty members.

content.Placements: Students are placed in the lowest companies. The highest package of this college is 10LPA, that's in a Rinex company. The lowest package is 2 LPA. An average package is 3.5 LPA. Top companies are Rinex, Daikin, Sury Software Solutions, and small IT companies. Internships they are getting in this college are IT based internships only. This college is best for the CSE and CSE allied branches. Top roles are IT based, and branches are good in this college.
content.Infrastructure: There is Wi-Fi in our classrooms. There is a good infrastructure. It's a campus with 5-6 blocks each. Our college has good nature. Hostel has washing machines, and in a single room approximately 42 members can stay. Weekly once students can wash clothes in the washing machines. There are good facilities. But rooms are short to survive. There are 2 wardens who take care of the students.

individual_reviews.title: The infrastructure is very good.

content.Placements: In our course, 90% of students get placed. The highest package is 7 LPA, and the average package is 4 LPA. The lowest package is 2 LPA. Top recruiting companies hire students from the college. All students in our college are very disciplined. Above 75% of students are eligible for internships.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and architecture in our college are very nice. Labs and classrooms are very well-painted. All facilities are available at all times. The computer lab is very good. Medical facilities are available for all members on the campus.

admission_overview.college_name: VIET Visakhapatnam Admission 2025: Fees, Courses, Eligibility and Selection

paragraphs: VIET Visakhapatnam admissionis both merit and entrance-based. The institute considers scores in AP EAMCET, AP ICET, AP PGECE, etc. scores for admission to specific programmes.Visakha Institute of Engineering and Technologyoffers courses at UG and PG levels in Management, Computer Applications and Engineering streams. The institute offers programmes in affiliation with JNTUGV Vizianagaram. Aspirants are offered admission through OAMDC or Online Admissions Module for Degree Colleges in Andhra Pradesh in BCA and BBA courses. Interested candidates can apply for the accepted entrance exam and the preferred course online.

VIET offers seven courses in full-time mode at UG and PG levels. The programmes are offered in various specialisations. Aspirants can check below the key highlights related toVIET Visakhapatnam admission:
Particulars
VIET Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
Admission status 2025
How to apply?
https://www.viet.edu.in/
Level of programmes offered
Popular programmes

VIET admissions are primarily entrance-based. The institute considers the merit of the aspirants in the last qualifying exam for BBA and BCA programmes. Candidates must fulfil the eligibility requirements to apply for a course. Below are popularVIET Visakhapatnam coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:

Currently, the admissions are open for all the VIET courses. Candidates are selected for admission based on their scores in an entrance test or a qualifying exam. The institute considers state-level entrance exams for admission. Below are the steps to get a seat in the institute:
Step 1: VIET Visakhapatnam Application Process 2025

Candidates must first apply for the accepted entrance exam or AP OAMDC portal as required by the course. After completion of the selection process, candidates also need to fill out the admission form on the institute's website for the preferred programme.
Step 2: Selection

VIET Visakhapatnam selects candidates for BTech and MTech courses based onAP EAMCETandAP PGECET, respectively. For admission to MBA, candidates must score well in AP ICET. Besides, the selection for BBA and BCA courses is based on merit of the aspirants in the last qualifying exam. The institute also considersAP POLYCETfor admission to diploma courses.
Step 3: Counselling & Seat Allotment

Aspirants need to further apply for state-level entrance exam counselling accepted for the applied course. Once the seat is allotted to aspirants who have appeared for the entrance exam, they need to fill out the admission form on the institute's website. For BBA and BCA, candidates are offered seats via OAMDC. Selected candidates need to pay theVIET feeto confirm their seats.

courses_data.description: VIET Visakhapatnam offers a four-year BTech course divided into eight semesters. The institute offers BTech in various specialisations such as Civil,Computer Science & Engineering, CSE-AI & ML,CSE-Data Science,Mechanical Engineering, etc. The institute also offers lateral entry to the BTech course. Admission to the BTech (Lateral Entry) courses is based onAP ECETscores.

faqs.question: Which are the BTech specialisations at Visakha Institute of Engineering and Technology?
faqs.answer: Visakha Institute of Engineering and Technology offers a four-year BTech course divided into eight semesters. Candidates who have completed Class 12 are eligible to apply for the course. Below are some of the BTech specialisations offered at VIET:CivilComputer Science & EngineeringCSE-AI & MLCSE-Data ScienceMechanical Engineering, etc.

faqs.question: How can I get admission in BTech at Visakha Institute of Engineering and Technology?
faqs.answer: Visakha Institute of Engineering and Technology admission to BTech course is based on Andhra Pradesh EAMCET scores. Candidates with a valid score in Andhra Pradesh EAMCET can participate in the entrance exam counselling for admission. Aspirants must also pass a minimum of Class 12 for admission to BTech course. Once selected, candidates need to pay a course fee to confirm their seat.

faqs.question: What is the fee for BTech at Visakha Institute of Engineering and Technology?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for Visakha Institute of Engineering and Technology BTech ranges betweenINR 1.7 lakhandINR 4 lakh. Candidates need to pay the course fee at the time of admission to confirm their seats. The total fee of BTech includes various components such as tuition fee, caution deposit, etc.

courses_data.name: VIET Visakhapatnam MBA Admission 2025
courses_data.description: VIET Visakhapatnam offers a two-year full-time MBA programme divided into four semesters. The institute offers MBA at the PG level in various specialisations such as HR, Finance, Marketing, Logistics & Supply Chain Management, Health Care & Hospital Management and Business Analytics/ Systems. Candidates who have completed their graduation are eligible to apply for the MBA course.

faqs.question: How much is the MBA fee at Visakha Institute of Engineering and Technology?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for Visakha Institute of Engineering and Technology MBA isINR 70,000. The total fee of MBA is a cumulative of components such as caution deposit, exam fee, etc. Aspirants opting for hostels need to pay a hostel fee at the time of admission.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for MBA at Visakha Institute of Engineering and Technology?
faqs.answer: Candidates who have completed graduation with a minimum of 45% aggregate are eligible to apply for Visakha Institute of Engineering and Technology MBA programme. Aspirants must hold the documents proving their eligibility for verification at the time of admission.

faqs.question: Which are the MBA specialisations offered at Visakha Institute of Engineering and Technology?
faqs.answer: Visakha Institute of Engineering and Technology offers MBA for two-years at the PG level. The course is spread across four semesters. Candidates after completing graduation can apply for MBA. Below is the MBA specialisations available at VIET:HRFinanceMarketingLogistics & Supply Chain ManagementHealth Care & Hospital ManagementBusiness Analytics/ Systems

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at VIET Visakhapatnam?
faqs.answer: Visakha Institute of Engineering and Technology offers admission to most of the programmes based on state-level entrance exams. The institute considers scores in Andhra Pradesh ICET, Andhra Pradesh EAMCET, Andhra Pradesh PGECET, etc. for admission to specific courses. Besides, the selection for BBA and BCA courses is based on merit of the aspirants in the last qualifying exam. Candidates need to apply for Andhra Pradesh OAMDC for BBA and BCA programmes.

faqs.question: How can I get admission at Visakha Institute of Engineering and Technology?
faqs.answer: Visakha Institute of Engineering and Technology admission to most of the programmes is entrance-based. The institute considers the merit of the aspirants in the last qualifying exam for BBA and BCA programmes. Admission to BTech and M.Tech courses based onAP EAMCETandAP PGECET, respectively. For admission to MBA, candidates have a valid score in Andhra Pradesh ICET.

faqs.question: What is the qualification required to apply at Visakha Institute of Engineering and Technology?
faqs.answer: Visakha Institute of Engineering and Technology specifies the minimum qualification and aggregate required to apply for a course. The basic eligibility for UG courses is Class 12 whereas graduation is required for PG courses. Below is course-wise eligibility for VIET:CourseCommon EligibilityBTechClass 12 with at least 45% aggregateMTechGraduation with a minimum of 50% aggregateMBAGraduation with a minimum of 50% aggregateBCAClass 12BBAClass 12

faqs.question: Is entrance exam accepted for Visakha Institute of Engineering and Technology admission?
faqs.answer: Yes, Visakha Institute of Engineering and Technology considers state-level entrance exam scores for admission to most of the UG and PG courses. Aspirants must appear for the entrance exam and score well to get a seat in the institute. Below is course-wise accepted entrance exam for VIET Visakhapatnam admissions:CourseAccepted Entrance ExamBTechAP EAMCETMTechAP PGECETMBAAP ICETDiplomaAP POLYCETBTech (LE)AP ECET

placement_data.title: Visakha Institute of Engineering and Technology Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: TKM Institute of Mana has a Training and Placement (T&P) Cell that helps in shaping the careers of students from their induction and orientation, summer internships, mid-term projects, right to their final placements and even beyond. The T&P Cell also undertakes various academic and non-academic initiatives so that students are well-equipped to meet varied industry requirements.

Recently, Visakha Institute of Engineering and Technology concluded the placements for the batch passed out in 2024 . As per the latest report, the highest and average package offered during Visakha Institute of Engineering and Technology placements 2024 stood at INR 6.5 LPA and INR 2.2 LPA, respectively. A total of 75 recruiters visited the Visakha Institute of Engineering and Technology campus for 2024 placements and placed 253 students of the Class 2024. The top recruiters of Visakha Institute of Engineering and Technology in 2024 included Allsec Technologies, Hexaware, Kodnest Technologies, Tech Mahindra, Daikin, KIML, Wipro, Q Spiders, Apollo Tyres, Rexnord Electricals , etc.
Note : The above-mentioned placement details are the combined details for all the campuses of Visakha Institute of Engineering and Technology.

reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and architecture in our college are very nice. Labs and classrooms are very well-painted. All facilities are available at all times. The computer lab is very good. Medical facilities are available for all members on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Review of the college VIET.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of Visakha Institute of Engineering and Technology is very beautiful and attractive. The facilities provided in labs included with fast Wi-Fi facility as well as in classrooms. Coming to hostel, it's just budget-friendly, this is not a hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Visakha Institute of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of Visakha Institute of Engineering and Technology is very cool and calm. The facilities available for our course we have the best labs with Wi-Fi facilities. Classrooms are clean and maintained. We have a big central library with a silent environment.

reviews.review_heading: The college review of VIET.
reviews.review_text: The facilities offered here are Wi-Fi, labs with the best equipment, and classrooms that are maintained nicely. Hostel is just budget-friendly, they charge only for the food we consume. It's not a hostel, they made classrooms into hostel rooms. There are six rooms in each room and 40 students to stay.

reviews.review_heading: Rating of the college with my own experience.
reviews.review_text: In our college, we have 24-hour Wi-Fi to browse and to develop our ideas. Labs are so good and clean. Classrooms are also clean and very well designed. In every classroom, there are projectors. We have labs and we also have full of equipment. The quality of the facilities in our hostel, the quality of food available in the mess and canteen, medical facilities, sports and games are good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of the college VIET.
reviews.review_text: The hostel of Visakha Institute of Engineering and Technology is budget-friendly. Here we stay 40 members per room. It consists of 6 big rooms. These are not rooms. These are classrooms. They converted into a hostel. Wi-Fi facility is very nice.

reviews.review_heading: Review of the college with my experience.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good. They provide Wi-Fi connection in each department or every floor. They have one library and one digital library. The library has a capacity of 300 students. The hostel is very bad. The food provided by the college is very unhygienic. They provide 2 canteens.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Visakha Institute of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of Visakha Institute of Engineering and Technology is very nice. There are so many labs with high network connections. The hostel is just budget-friendly. The hostel is okay for students who can adjust to 40 members in each room. It is not charging for a stay and it only charges for food.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Visakha Institute of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is better. Wi-Fi is available in every block. Labs are well-maintained and good. Classrooms are neat, clean, and well-maintained. A big central library is also available on the campus. Hostel food is very delicious.

reviews.review_heading: Review of the college.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities are nice and friendly behavior in all department. College has a Wi-Fi facility and labs, a Chemistry lab, a Physics lab, an Engineering workshop, and an IT workshop. There are two libraries. The hostel is not good and the food quality in the hostel is the worst.

reviews.review_heading: Review of the college in which I am going to complete my graduation.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. Classrooms have good air conditioning in the B.Tech campus. Outside experience is also good to hill and have fun with it. Overall, it is a good experience with the infrastructure of the college with all factors.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Mountains are located around the college, so it makes the college environment very beautiful. Wi-Fi is available. Labs are nice. Classrooms are also very nice. A central library is available. Coming to the hostel, it is not a hostel. They converted classrooms into a hostel. It consists of six big rooms. 40 students stay in each room, so it's your wish to join the hostel or not.

reviews.review_heading: Expect the future is better here.
reviews.review_text: The environment at the college, both outside and inside the classrooms are good. Still the hostels were terrible, with 30 to 40 students per room. This made it very difficult especially during the summer months. The college also lacked proper facilities for students living in the hostels.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied in teaching and satisfied in labs, hostel.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and the labs environment was just okay to our college. The labs are quite less maintenance and it was difficult to do the experiments. The library facilities are good and the classroom facilities are good. The sports and the canteen facilities are less and the hostel maintenance is also okay only.

reviews.review_heading: College days more memorable.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure was more than adequate, and we had all the facilities we needed on campus, including computer labs, a workshop, and a library. The hostel was very nice, with good maintenance, and each room had only two occupants. We enjoyed our B.Tech days very much.

reviews.review_heading: JNTUHCES is the best college.
reviews.review_text:
A lot of facilities are available on our campus, such as labs, libraries, ground, systems, and especially computer labs for learning CREO, CAD-CAM, CNC programming, etc.
Coming to the hostel section, we got good infrastructure with a solid atmosphere in each room. We used to stay with two people and we had a super experience in our hostel days.

reviews.review_heading: I am happy to be part of this.
reviews.review_text: Beautiful infrastructure on our campus with neat maintenance; we have all labs with proper equipment, like production lanes. Cad cam lab, camputer lab as well. We also have a library with lots of different books by great authors coming to the hostel. It's like heaven for us with ambient space and superb ground to play different games.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure is very nice.
reviews.review_text: Our university is excellent in its infrastructure and greenery. The equipment in the laboratory is good. A total of five branches are in our university. Each branch has it's own block. Classrooms are neatly maintained. There is a campus-provided hostel and dispensary too.

reviews.review_heading: Journey of 4 years in JNTUH CES.
reviews.review_text: Coming to the infrastructure, it will be good—the labs, classrooms, library—everything will be good but there will be no Wi-Fi connection on campus. Canteen food will be okay but most of the time it will be closed. There will be medical facilities, and sports are conducted once per year.

reviews.review_heading: Come to learn in this college.
reviews.review_text: In our hostel, it is so comfortable to stay. In each room, two people will be allotted a comfortable area, and we also have a badminton court inside the hostel block. We also have a hot water facility and we have showers in the bathroom and proper ground.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfying college life but dissatisfying future with the college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very good. We have library, Gym, Sports Complex, Canteen and auditorium in the college. We can enjoy very well in the college. Two grounds are available for playing. The college environment is very beautiful. Hostels are also good.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure, facilities, and good placements since last 5 years.

reviews.review_heading: I don't recommend this college but the location is in a village so it's very peaceful.

The college is in a rural area so it is very peaceful to develop good study habits and focus on one thing. Food is not great but okay. Medical facilities are good. Sports and games are good.

reviews.review_heading: Really good college and the highest package in 2021 was INR 12.5L.

placements.overview:
School of Ocean Engineering, VELS Institute of Science, Technology and Advanced Studies is a private institute, established in 1992 in Chennai, Tamil Nadu. School of Ocean Engineering, VELS Institute of Science, Technology and Advanced Studies is approved by AICTE and offers a total of 1 course at UG levels in 1 specialisation such as Naval Architecture. Furthermore, it offer course such as B.E. / B.Tech in Full Time mode. School of Ocean Engineering, VELS Institute of Science, Technology and Advanced Studies fee structure includes a total tuition fee is INR 4,99,900. School of Ocean Engineering, VELS Institute of Science, Technology and Advanced Studies has an annual seat intake of 30 for all the programmes. It offers course, in stream such as Engineering. The institute has a safe and well-equipped campus with all the advanced facilities.

Q. What is the total fee structure for BTech in Petroleum Engineering offered by School of Ocean Engineering, VISTAS?

A. The total fee structure for BTech in Petroleum Engineering offered by School of Ocean Engineering, VISTAS is Rs 4.79 lakh.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Naval Architecture and Offshore Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Dissatisfied with management of college.

review_content.Placements: Only one batch is out now. Some companies are visiting our college, but not core companies. Internship is available for the students like NIOT, Hindustan, Kochi shipyard. Regarding our course, our passed out batch doesn't get job through the campus interview. They doesn't provide any campus placement.
review_content.Infrastructure: Vast library is there but the books related to our course is very limited. There is no proper labs for software as well as for other labs like dynamic labs etc. Food in hostel is not much bad. Other than sports and medical facilities are there.

reviews_list.batch_info: - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is neither too good nor too bad.

review_content.Placements: There are no placements for my department yet, but for other departments, many companies came for campus interviews; this is because the course was started just three years ago. As far as my department is concerned, we are told that we might get a few companies this year.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has a vast campus. Auditoriums are good. The library is very neat and user-friendly. The classrooms are not good; they are very hot. Hostel rooms and the food available are very bad. Labs are also bad. There is no Wi-Fi provided on the campus. The conference rooms are also good. The canteen food is good and healthy.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Naval Architecture and Offshore Engineering - Batch of 2014
reviews_list.review_title: It is the best college if you want to achieve your dreams easily.

review_content.Placements: I think during my placement session of our college, many of my friends got placements except for a few who have started their own business later. So, nearly 78% of the students from our batch got placements in good companies. CGI, Microsoft and Google are the top recruiters for our course. Engineer and tech consultant are the top roles offered in our course.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has all extra facilities like neat and clean classrooms and well-equipped library, but there is no Wi-Fi connection. The hostel of our college was quite huge and clean with all sorts of basic facilities like proper washrooms and bathrooms, and proper rooms are allotted. Even the mess was quite better than the mess of other colleges.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Naval Architecture and Offshore Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Dissatisfied because of faculty, no placements.

review_content.Placements: 50% placements. the highest salary is at 71.80$ the lowest salary is at 29.80$ and average salary is at 93,110$. Shipping company came for recruitment. Repairing, producing, designing safe sea worth surface or underwater vessels roles offered. 149.330$ is the highest and average is at 93,110$and the lowest at 29.38$ offered. 100% internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities are okay. Infrastructure is bad for our department. We don't have Wi-Fi and classroom conditions are the worst. We having a good library. Our facilities are okay some of our staffs are rude. Hostel is good. Food is okay. Sports and games are good. We having a good medical facilities inside the camps.

hostel_campus.college_name: School of Ocean Engineering Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: VELS University has separate hostel facility for boys and girls. Laundry facility is available to the students on chargeable basis. Mess and Canteen facility is also available for the inmates at reasonable rates.

library.description:
VELS Institute of Science, Technology and Advanced Studies has a fully automated central library with a seating capacity of 500 persons and follows Open Access System. The library has a collection of 114305 books, 137717 e-books, and 10032 back volumes. It has the subscription of more than 359 Periodicals (National & International), more than 12381 e-journals, 4106 dissertations, 4849 audio-visual resources.
It also facilitates access to e-journals from IEEE/IEL, ASME, ASCE, EBSCO, ProQuest, BENTHAM Science Pharmacy, Micromedex’s Drugdex System, Inventi Online, Nature Online, Law finder, NPTEL etc.
The library is also an associate member of Madras Library Network (MALIBNET) and Institutional member British Council Library.

faqs.question: Q: Is Nadar Saraswathi College of Engineering and Technology a known college/Institute?

faqs.answer: Nadar Saraswathi College of Engineering and Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu. Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate. Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply. Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced. Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile. Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.M.E./M.TechCandidate who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE are also eligible. AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Review of Nadar Saraswathi College of Engineering and Technology.

content.Placements: Above 60% of students in our batch got placed. The lowest salary offered was Rs.25,000 per month and the highest salary offered was Rs.45,000 per month. Our college provided internships for better experience and and better communication.
content.Infrastructure: Our college covered 5 departments namely, CSE, ECE, Civil, EEE, and Mechanical. The infrastructure was very good. There was a transport facility and a good internet connection.
content.Faculty: Staff members of our college had communication and listening skills. They helped me throughout my career. The industry explored technical, non-technical, and personal activities such as teamwork and communication skills, integrity, reliability, and self-motivation.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college in Tamil Nadu.

content.Infrastructure: Our college was located in a peaceful place with very good surroundings and greenery. Many classrooms, laboratories, and a library were available. Hostel was provided separately for boys and girls. The quality of food served in the hostel was very good.

faqs.question: How can I get into Nadar Saraswathi College of Engineering and Technology for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
Nadar Saraswathi College of Engineering and Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu.
Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate.
Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply.
Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced.
Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years

reviews.review_heading: Review of Nadar Saraswathi College of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: Our college covered 5 departments namely, CSE, ECE, Civil, EEE, and Mechanical. The infrastructure was very good. There was a transport facility and a good internet connection.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college in Tamil Nadu.
reviews.review_text: Our college was located in a peaceful place with very good surroundings and greenery. Many classrooms, laboratories, and a library were available. Hostel was provided separately for boys and girls. The quality of food served in the hostel was very good.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied with the rules and regulations of our college.
reviews.review_text: Many labs are available in our college. Students are not allowed to use mobile inside the campus. Facilities are not available much. Students are restricted by the management for several normal activities which are very inconvenient to be on this campus.

reviews.review_heading: Our college offers a good atmosphere.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides all facilities for students. Our college provides high-speed internet connectivity in all departments and laboratory. The library and laboratory are well-equipped and furnished. Food served in the hostel is healthy. The atmosphere in the hostel is clean, and it is well maintained.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good.
reviews.review_text: The college offers good placement opportunities with top companies visiting the campus. Students receive training in soft skills and technical skills. Many secure jobs in IT, core, and service sectors with decent salary packages through campus interviews.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with joining this college.
reviews.review_text: Basic infrastructure, no good lab facilities, no good faculty. They won't take any action regarding the infrastructure. They will take money without any information from the cash price of students. Take the risk and join another college that will help you grow. If we support them, we can survive.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members in the college are highly talented and friendly with the students.
reviews.review_text: There is a basic entrance exam to know about the skill level of the student. Based on the result of the exam, the students will be guided for their further development. A separate ground is available for all games and sports. Many extracurricular activities were conducted by the excellent faculty in our college. There were both indoor and outdoor games. NSS and NCC units are also present.

reviews.review_heading: Really bad infrastructure but good faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The bad infrastructure I ever seen and the classrooms are little bad that is located in the hills. The canteen facilities are available in the college. Hostel rooms are good and neat.
